description: Create an interactive dashboard tiddler titled 'Reagent Inventory' to manage laboratory supplies. The wiki contains tiddlers tagged 'Reagent', each with a 'stock_level' (integer) field and a 'unit' (string) field. The dashboard must display all reagents sorted alphabetically by title, showing their current stock level and unit. Provide controls to increment and decrement each reagent's 'stock_level' by 1 directly from the dashboard without opening the tiddlers in edit mode. Use native TiddlyWiki action widgets and filter math without external plugins or JavaScript macros.
